name: HL 论文（4000词）
subject: english
domain_name: 评估任务 / Assessment Components / Assessment
curriculum_points: Students will be able to produce a formal, 1200-1500 word academic essay that develops a clear line of inquiry into a literary or non-literary text(s) studied in the course, demonstrating independent research and critical thinking.

Students will be able to construct a sophisticated, sustained argument, supported by precise textual evidence and engagement with relevant scholarly sources, and presented with appropriate academic conventions.

interactive_resources.note: 制作课件时在 search_url 搜索对应练习，获取 embed 代码嵌入
